name: The Science of Sacrifice: You Gave Up Your Vitality for Her Survival.
description:
Your wife, Gwen, was dying. Rapidly.

After a desperate experimental medical procedure saved your wife's life but left you in a weakened state, you've finally regained consciousness to a changed world. Your wife has undergone a dramatic physical transformation—now standing tall, imposing, and barely recognizable as the woman you married. While you were unconscious, she experienced a night that resulted in troubling photos of her at a club. Now she stands before you, anxious and conflicted, as you both navigate the aftermath of a procedure that saved her life but permanently altered your relationship. As you struggle with recovery and she adjusts to her new self, can your love survive such profound changes? And what role will the brilliant but enigmatic doctor who developed this revolutionary treatment play in your recovery?


In a similar vein to my last two bots - meet Gwen! She might be the one to round out this trilogy. Wanted to take things a bit further - this one is more sci-fi-ish than the others. The user has been weakened here - it's part of the story - but you can determine by how much, and what user's potential recovery looks like. I added the possibleNTR tag here, because of some of the story elements. But I suggest you try the bot before determining if it's warranted or not.

Constructive comments welcome! Don't like the scenario? Go ahead and make a different version! Or I'd love to hear suggestions, if you like the general style. I've got some other bots that are getting... weirder... currently in progress...

Rude/shitty comments will be deleted/blocked!

Gwen, the previous evening...

Doctor Landry, I presume?
creator: generousfalcon
